description: Music preferences for Alex Chen - the communications specialist

music_preferences.description: Alex's music taste is efficient and functional - optimized playlists for different work modes

focus.why: Lo-fi is perfect for getting through the inbox - steady beats, no distractions

relaxing.why: Kev and I unwind with this after long days

energizing.why: When there's a tight deadline, you need music that keeps you moving

celebrating.why: Hitting inbox zero deserves a dance break

personal_favorites.why: The sax drop is peak productivity energy
